Dear Investor, Greetings from EAAA India Alternatives! We thank you for your continued patronage with ISAF-III Onshore Fund. Please be informed that ISAF-III Onshore Fund has announced the 8th Drawdown which is calculated @ 8% of your capital commitment in the Fund. The due date for the Drawdown is 18th February 2025. Kindly ensure to make payment towards the 8th Drawdown on or before 18th February 2025. Please find attached the Drawdown Notice, Deal Note, list of CAMS Centres and the Transaction Slip for your reference. The attachment is password protected for safety and privacy reasons. You may access this statement by entering password in CAPITAL letters, which is the PAN of the first holder registered in the system. Further to this, you are requested to please transfer the fund / deposit the cheque {in favor of "ISAF-III Onshore Fund"} along with the transaction slip (as an acknowledgement) duly filled and signed and submit it to your Edelweiss Relationship Manager or at the nearest CAMS Customer Service Center. Alternatively, the payment may be made by RTGS as per the details provided hereunder: Name of the Account Holder ISAF III Onshore Fund Bank Name ICICI Bank Limited Account Type Current Account Account Number 000405651810 IFSC Code (For RTGS) ICIC0000004 Further as per SEBI circular we would request you to please provide the DEMAT details / CML Copies with us at the earliest. In case of any further assistance / clarification please feel free to contact us on isafiiionshore@camsonline.com. Warm Regards, For EAAA India Alternatives Limited formerly known as Edelweiss Alternative Asset Advisors Ltd. (Investment Manager to ISAF III Onshore Fund) Bhakti Bhende Service Manager, Nuvama Private 9136982940 Office no - 601, 6th floor,Westport - UrbanWrk,Pan Card Club Road, Baner,Pune, Pune 411045 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ', '
